rationale: EU-facing GPAI or AI-system offerings can trigger EU AI Act obligations even when the lab is headquartered outside the EU.
notes: This is not an official lab-specific enforcement finding; it is a legal-applicability hook based on provider activity in the EU market.
verificationNotes: Official source verifies the EU AI Act and its GPAI obligations. Lab-specific exposure is assessed from EU market-facing activity, not from a lab-named enforcement record.
